Event: Titanic Excavation - Nov 2024
Event Date: 28/11/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A28
Cutting Air

Triggers: Once in a while

The unit casts a deep freeze effect on 3 random enemies for 3 sec. During this time, the frozen units can't move or attack, and the cooldown time of all their abilities (except those granted by the set equipped) is increased by 3 sec. When the deep freeze effect wears off, the targets of the ability explode and take 250000 magic damage, and icicles fly out of them and into 3 nearby enemies. On hit, icicles deal 200000 magic damage, increase the cooldown time of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec, and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of affected units is reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
